reviews.author: Rosleen Kaur (RK)
reviews.review_body:
Apeejay schools need no introduction as such & Apeejay Faridabad is a fantastic school that creates a nurturing and dynamic learning environment. The committed staff & adept teachers at Apeejay Faridabad are deeply invested in students' success, providing individual support and offering a variety of academic and extracurricular options.
The school focuses on fostering both academic achievement and personal growth. The holistic focus on both studies and sports alongwith other extra curricular activities is a great blend that students are exposed to and learn from.
With its modern facilities, wonderful and safe campus,  strong community spirit and innovative teaching methods,  Apeejay Faridabad offers an ideal setting for students to excel and realize their full potential.
My child enjoys going to the school and I am really glad with the engagements and support that is extended by the class teacher Ms Surbhi Jain. He is also fond of other teachers and it also reflects in his understanding how clearly topics were taught in the class.

reviews.author: manpreet singh
reviews.review_body: Apeejay school has provided both my children with best education and guidance. Under the teacher’s mentorship my son got admission in delhi university. I am very happy with their overall growth as a human being

reviews.author: Ashok Narula
reviews.review_body: Apeejay school in Faridabad is so good . Teachers are very cooperative and academic and non academic activities are very good. Teachers always push children to perform in every field and they not give extra burden on parents. All staff of every subject is very good and they prepare students very nicely. Head soft to all teachers.

reviews.author: Rashid Khan
reviews.review_body: Very good school...one of the best in Faridabad........as of moment......acadmic restructuring is required......could become the best in NCR if proper and honest efforts are put in by the faculty and administration.....👍

reviews.author: Tisha Setia
reviews.review_body: One of the the best school in Faridabad. It also focuses on the skill development of students. Love this school.

reviews.author: Akshay Vishnoi
reviews.review_body:
School is very good.I have personally notice my Son's progress in both academically and co curricular activities.

Recommended

reviews.author: himanshu kohli
reviews.review_body:
The school with years of legacy
Experienced and supportive teachers .
Focus on holistic development of the child
I am very happy with the school

reviews.author: Tanush Goel
reviews.review_body: I highly recommend Apeejay School because of the values it builds and inculcates in its students. APJ offers countless opportunities to its students to learn, grow and prosper.

reviews.author: vijayant shandilya
reviews.review_body:
Apeejay is one of the best school in Faridabad. It has good experienced faculty. The school provides a wide exposure to students laying a balanced emphasis on academics and co scholastic activities.

Adv. Vijayant Shandilya

reviews.author: Sakshi Malhotra
reviews.review_body: Apj is one of the best school in faridabad. I am impressed with school curriculum and teaching skills. All teachers are supportive and helpful. School is doing really well and I am very thankful to the school authorities.
